# I Ching (Book of Changes) Unicode Symbols

A package that provides access to I Ching symbols including hexagrams (д·Җ), trigrams(вҳ·), bigrams(вҡҚ), and monograms (вҡӢ); Chinese and English names; and links to original text and translation from ctext.org.

## To Install

espanso install i-ching

## To find hexagram symbols

Type `:ic` follow by a 6-digit binary (1/0s) starting from the top line. For example,

- `:ic111111` вҶ’ д·Җ (1 of the 64 Hexagrams that represents THE CREATIVE HEAVEN)
- `:ic000000` вҶ’ д·Ғ (THE RECEPTIVE EARTH)
- and so on.

## To learn more

- **C**hinese:   `:icc111111` вҶ’ д№ҫеҚҰ д·Җ (Chinese name + Hexagram)
- **E**nglish:  `:ice000000` вҶ’ THE RECEPTIVE EARTH д·Ғ (English name + Hexagram)
- **L**ink:     `:icl111111` [https://ctext.org/book-of-changes/qian](https://ctext.org/book-of-changes/qian) (**L**ink to original text)

- **M**onograms:      `:icm0` вҶ’ вҡӢ (е…©е„Җ, 1 of 2 that represents Ying йҷ°)
- **B**igrams:       `:icb11` вҶ’ вҡҢ (еӣӣиұЎ, 1 of 4 that represents Greater Yang еӨӘйҷҪ)
- **T**rigrams:      `:ict011` вҶ’ вҳұ (е…«еҚҰ, 1 of 8 that represents Lake жҫӨ)

## To search by order

- **N**umber: `:icn30` вҶ’ йӣўеҚҰ д·қ (вҖҰеӨ§йҒҺеқҺйӣўдёүеҚҒеӮҷвҖҰ)
